name: KoBoToolbox
description: Work with KoBoToolbox forms and submissions

fields.label: Allowed Domain
fields.description: Allowed Domain of your KoBoToolbox account (host token in the API base URL)

fields.label: Form Name or ID
fields.description: Form ID (e.g. aSAvYreNzVEkrWg5Gdcvg). Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Allowed Domain

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: sort)
